description: Building-inspection domain rules — condition weighting + AI-finding validation gates. Modeled on the besiktning app (besiktningsprotokoll). Consumed alongside inspection_schema.json.

review_gate.rule: AI-matched findings below min_ai_confidence_auto_accept must have validated_by_user = true before the protocol is finalized.
review_gate.note: Enforced in the besiktning app workflow; engine flags rows that violate it.
